zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Calthorpe於1462年出生在英國諾福爾可考可索普時，他的父親John Calthorpe25歲，母親Alice Catherine Astley22歲。他於大約1498年與Alianore Bernard在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年1月10日在他的家鄉享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Calthorpe于1462年出生在英国諾福爾可考可索普时，他的父亲John Calthorpe25岁，母亲Alice Catherine Astley22岁。他于大约1498年与Alianore Bernard在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年1月10日在他的家乡享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Calthorpe was born in 1462, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, John Calthorpe, was 25 and his mother, Alice Catherine Astley, was 22. He married Alianore Bernard about 1498, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 January 1548, in his hometown, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Calthorpe est né en 1462, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Calthorpe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Catherine Astley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alianore Bernard environ 1498, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Calthorpe 1462 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Calthorpe 25 und seine Mutter Alice Catherine Astley 22. Er hat um 1498 in Norfolk, England Alianore Bernard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1548 im Alter von 86 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Calthorpe è nato il nel 1462 nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Calthorpe, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Catherine Astley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alianore Bernard circa 1498, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 gennaio 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Calthorpeが1462年にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで生まれた時，父John Calthorpeは25歳，母Alice Catherine Astleyは22歳であった。約1498年にイギリスノーフォルクでAlianore Bernardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年1月10日に故郷で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Calthorpe(이)가 1462년 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Calthorpe(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Catherine Astley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1498년 영국 노르폴크에서 Alianore Bernard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 1월 10일 그의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Cockthorpe,Norfolk,England: Cockthorpe, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Calthorpe nasceu em 1462, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Calthorpe, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Catherine Astley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianore Bernard aproximadamente 1498, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1548, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Calthorpe родился в 1462 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Calthorpe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Catherine Astley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianore Bernard около 1498 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 января 1548 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Calthorpe nació en 1462, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Calthorpe, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Catherine Astley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alianore Bernard aproximadamente 1498, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de enero de 1548, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años.
